product_direction: AI-generated recommendation in -> defensible Trust Decision Record out
doctrine: The workbench exists to produce the record.
Vendor risk is the first wedge.
Do not drift back to dashboard-first, TrustMap-first, runtime-agent-first, broad governance, generic trust-score, or autonomous-agent positioning until the record workflow works.

routes.expected_behavior: Direct users to the guided vendor-risk demo first and redirect after 12 seconds.
Six-step guided vendor-risk trust decision loop with record generation, print, JSON download, and simulated CRM payload prep.
Show GO when the guided vendor-risk record contract passes.
Provide one checklist for controlled demo validation and stop conditions.
Capture local browser defect reports and allow copy/download JSON. No backend submission.
Provide deeper ATDR workbench inspection without replacing the guided route as primary demo.
Support smoke-readiness review for existing ATDR workbench.
Collect or display advisor-feedback workflow without distracting from vendor-risk demo.
Preserve prior Executive OS / Trust Kernel experience. Do not delete. Do not restore as root.

non_goals_until_vendor_risk_loop_is_done: Live Google Sheet write without configured endpoint
static_prototype_limitations: Browser Print / Save PDF is current PDF path
CRM capture is simulated until REPORT_CAPTURE_ENDPOINT is configured
